case_title: ENA PASTORA VARGAS VS. RAYMOND ALEXANDER VARGAS

docket_entries.description: IS BROUGHT BEFORE THIS COURT. RESP MUST ENROLL IN AND COMPLETE A CERTIFIED BATTERER'S TREATMENT PROGRAM.. ORDER SIGNED. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY KENT GUBBINE, #5797.
(403/CWW) PET IN PRO PER; N/A RESP AT 1:55P. PROOF OF SERVICE IN ORDER.  GOOD CAUSE APPEARING, THE COURT ORDERS A STANDARD CONDUCT RESTRAINING ORDER AGAINST RESP WITH
APPL & DECLARATION FOR ORDER PROHIBITING DOMESTIC VIOLENCE
RESP TO FILE PROOF OF SURRENDER WITHIN 72 HOURS OF RECEIPT OF THIS ORDER. PET AWARDED SOLE L/C AND P/C. NO CV FOR RESP UNTIL A PROPER CC/CV MOTION
PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICES RESTRAINING ORDER AFTER HEARING
PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE- OSC & TRO; DECL UCCJEA
100 YARD STAY AWAY INCLUDING NICOLE ENA VARGAS, SCHOOL, AND CHILD CARE. PET MAY RECORD PROHIBITED COMMUNICATIONS MADE BY RESTRAINED PARTY. RESP
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE-DOMESTIC VIOLENCE, CALENDAR MOTION: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, CALENDAR MOTION: TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER HEARING SET FOR JUL-24-2001 AT 01:00 PM IN DEPT 403
RESTRAINING ORDER AFTER HEARING-MICROFILMED REEL/BATCH F: 370-07
